Alphabet Inc. is offering 167,500,000 Series B Depositary Shares, each representing a 1/20th interest in 6.25% Series B Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock, priced at $50 per share.
Alphabet Inc. is offering 167,500,000 Series A Depositary Shares, each representing a 1/20th interest in 6.25% Series A Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock, priced at $50 per share.
Alphabet Inc. is offering 25,459,689 shares of Class A and 25,459,689 shares of Class C stock.
Alphabet Inc. is offering up to $40 billion of its Class A and Class C common stock through an "at-the-market" program to fund employee equity tax obligations and for general corporate purposes.
Alphabet Inc. is offering 150,000,000 Series B Depositary Shares, each representing a 1/20th interest in its % Series B Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock.
Alphabet Inc. is offering 150 million Series A Depositary Shares, each representing a 1/20th interest in its Series A Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock.
Alphabet Inc. is offering $15 billion of its Class A and Class C stock.
Alphabet Inc. completed a public offering of ¥576.9 billion in Japanese yen-denominated senior notes.
Alphabet Inc. is offering various yen-denominated notes with different interest rates and maturity dates.
Alphabet Inc. completed offerings of €9 billion in euro notes and C$9.5 billion in Canadian dollar notes on May 11, 2026.
Alphabet Inc. is offering yen-denominated notes with various maturity dates and interest rates.
